tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym slowem, tak aby powstal spojny i poprawny logicznie oraz gramatycznie tekst.
tasks.text:
Stretching across much of North Africa, the Sahara is by 1.1. _________ the largest hot desert on the planet, covering an area roughly the size of the United States. Contrary to popular 1.2. _________, the Sahara is not entirely made up of sand dunes. In 1.3. _________, sandy areas account for only about a quarter of its total surface, while the remainder consists of rocky plateaus, gravel plains, and even mountain 1.4. _________.

Temperatures in the Sahara can 1.5. _________ dramatically. During the day, the thermometer may climb above 50 degrees Celsius, yet after sunset, it is not 1.6. _________ for the temperature to drop below freezing. This extreme variation poses a serious 1.7. _________ to both plants and animals. Nevertheless, a surprising number of species have managed to 1.8. _________ to these harsh conditions, including the fennec fox, whose oversized ears help release excess body heat.

For centuries, the Tuareg people have 1.9. _________ their living by trading goods across the desert using camel caravans. Although modern transport has reduced the need for such journeys, their traditions remain an essential part of the region's cultural 1.10. _________.
